positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial forest scene. A central grouping of abstract, bioluminescent trees with clean, sharp silhouettes against a deep midnight blue and indigo gradient sky. The trees should incorporate geometric, crystalline structures and glowing points of warm gold and cyan light. Floating geometric planets and stylized constellations form the background elements, giving the sense of infinite depth. The overall composition must be balanced, high contrast, and perfectly suited for a centered, repeatable print on apparel. Vector art style mixed with ethereal bioluminescence. Cinematic lighting, high detail, clean line work, 8k print quality, symmetrical design.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, lowres, grain, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, cluttered, grayscale, photography, realistic photo, messy, imperfect lines
